image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about context dependent memory than social media does.
Context visual: Imagine walking into a room and suddenly remembering something from last week. That’s context dependent memory at work.
Escalation visual: It means our memories are tied to the environment we’re in. Change the setting, and you may forget!
Evidence visual: Studies show that people recall information better in the same context where they learned it.
Payoff visual: So, if you study in a coffee shop, try testing in one. You might be amazed at your results!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into how your brain works? Like and follow for more mind-blowing science!
